response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus the 5-10 years required, no demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle work, no Windows-platform focus, and zero capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain exposure. Career trajectory is firmly web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than low-latency C++ on Windows for financial systems.
strengths: Long software engineering career with senior/staff titles
Strong testing and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
Some low-latency/high-throughput backend exposure at Dunnhumby
concerns: Far below required hands-on C++ experience and not on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience, only MongoDB/MySQL/generic SQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking background

key_factors.factor: No financial services / fixed income domain
